data.content: Implementation review APPROVED. Centralized prompt rendering into action_prompt::render_for_profile, removed static skills fallback (skills module now cfg(test) only), fixed Box::leak memory leak in poll_claim, added evaluating.md Loom prompt, and preserved workflow selection in resolve_skill_by_name. All files under 500 lines. Tests cover custom workflow prompt lookup for claim/poll/peek/skill and verify no legacy fallback for custom workflows.
